title: hedyosmum subintegrum
intro: Hedyosmum subintegrum, also known as the Chinese quicksilver flower, is a flowering plant species within the Hedyosmum genus. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hedyosmum subintegrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and promote digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Hedyosmum subintegrum is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal supplements or added to traditional remedies.
